mermaidSyntax:
graph TD
  subgraph GENE["🧬 Genomics Pipeline"]
    G1[WGS Sequencing] --> G2[Variant Calling]
    G2 --> G3[SNP/Indel Annotation]
  end
  subgraph TRANS["🧪 Transcriptomics Pipeline"]
    T1[RNA-seq] --> T2[Differential Expression]
    T2 --> T3[Pathway Enrichment]
  end
  subgraph PROT["🔬 Proteomics Pipeline"]
    P1[Mass Spec] --> P2[Protein Quantification]
    P2 --> P3[PTM Analysis]
  end
  G3 --> HUB
  T3 --> HUB
  P3 --> HUB
  subgraph HUBB["🔗 Integration Hub"]
    HUB((Integration Hub)) --> MOFA[MOFA]
    HUB --> NET[Network Analysis]
    HUB --> CAU[Causal Inference]
  end
  MOFA --> BIO
  NET --> MEC
  CAU --> PUB
  subgraph BIOB["🎯 Biomarker Discovery"]
    BIO[Biomarker Discovery] --> B1[Candidate Selection]
    B1 --> B2[Validation Cohort]
    B2 --> B3[Clinical Utility]
  end
  subgraph MECB["💡 Mechanism Insight"]
    MEC[Mechanism Insight] --> M1[Pathway Modeling]
    M1 --> M2[Drug Target ID]
  end
  subgraph PUBB["📚 Publication"]
    PUB[Publication] --> P1[Manuscript]
    P1 --> P2[Peer Review]
    P2 --> P3[Journal]
  end
  G3 -.->|variants inform DE| T2
  P3 -.->|PTMs validate pathways| T3
  B3 -.->|targeted validation| G1
  B3 -.->|targeted validation| T1
  B3 -.->|targeted validation| P1
  style HUB fill:#6366f1,stroke:#4338ca,color:#fff
  style B3 fill:#10b981,stroke:#047857,color:#fff
  style M2 fill:#f59e0b,stroke:#d97706,color:#000
  style P3 fill:#8b5cf6,stroke:#6d28d9,color:#fff
